user.title: NEM Price Forecaster — Region & Calibration
user.description: Configure your NEM region and calibration settings. Available regions: {regions}

data_description.region: Your NEM dispatch region (e.g. QLD1 for Queensland)
data_description.calibration_window_days: How many days of historical (predicted, actual) price pairs to retain for calibration. Older observations are down-weighted exponentially.
data_description.calibration_min_observations: Number of (predicted, actual) pairs required before isotonic calibration activates. Until then, raw PD7DAY / 1000 is used.
data_description.plausibility_cap_dollars_per_kwh: Calibrated prices above this cap are clamped. Protects against extreme market cap events propagating to retail prices.

tariff.title: NEM Price Forecaster — Tariff Settings
tariff.description: Configure GST, fixed network charges, and feed-in behaviour.

data_description.gst_rate: Applied to import price only. Export is GST-excluded per ATO ruling.
data_description.fixed_adder_per_kwh: Flat per-kWh network/service charge added on top of wholesale before GST. Does NOT apply to export.
data_description.feed_in_is_wholesale: When enabled, export price = calibrated wholesale RRP ($/kWh, GST-excluded). This matches Amber's model. Disable only if your retailer offers a fixed feed-in tariff (configure as a zero-rate ToU band).

tou_bands.title: NEM Price Forecaster — Time-of-Use Bands

forecast.title: NEM Price Forecaster — Forecast Settings
forecast.description: Configure the forecast horizon and output resolution. PD7DAY is natively 30-min; other periods are resampled automatically. Period options: {period_options} minutes.

data_description.forecast_horizon_hours: How far ahead to forecast (hours). Default 168 h = 7 days (the full PD7DAY horizon). Maximum 336 h = 14 days.
data_description.forecast_period_minutes: Output slot resolution in minutes. 5 or 15 = upsampled via interpolation; 30 = native PD7DAY resolution (no resampling); 60 = downsampled via mean. Use 5-min when feeding EMHASS with freq=5.

error.invalid_json: Invalid JSON. Please check your input and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to reach NEMWeb. Check your internet connection.

abort.already_configured: This NEM region is already configured.

data.tou_bands_json: ToU bands (JSON array, leave blank to keep current)

error.invalid_json: Invalid JSON in ToU bands field.
